description: White 100% combed cotton inner vest with squared scoop neck and signature Levi's reg tag on hem Wash care Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron as needed Do not dry clean If you need a basic vest to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. Levi's know what they're doing when they come up with practical basics which will make you look and feel great. The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
